heading: Native Hawaiian health scholarships

children.text: meet the requirements of paragraphs (1), (3), and (4) of section 254(b) of this title, andl

children.label: A
children.text: the provision of scholarships in each type of health care profession training shall correspond to the need for each type of health care professional identified in the Native Hawaiian comprehensive health care master plan implemented under to serve the Native Hawaiian health care systems, as identified by Papa Ola Lokahi;section 11703 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the primary health services covered under the scholarship assistance program under this section shall be the services included under the definition of that term under ;section 11711(8) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: to the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary shall select scholarship recipients from a list of eligible applicants submitted by the Papa Ola Lokahi;

children.label: i
children.text: first, in any one of the five Native Hawaiian health care systems; and

children.label: I
children.text: a health professional shortage area or medically underserved area located in the State of Hawaii; or

children.label: aa
children.text: located in the State of Hawaii; and

children.label: bb
children.text: has a designation that is similar to a designation described in subclause (I) made by the Secretary, acting through the Public Health Service;

children.label: E
children.text: the provision of counseling, retention and other support services shall not be limited to scholarship recipients, but shall also include recipients of other scholarship and financial aid programs enrolled in appropriate health professions training programs,1So in original. The comma probably should be a semicolon.1

children.label: F
children.text: the obligated service of a scholarship recipient shall not be performed by the recipient through membership in the National Health Service Corps; and

children.label: G
children.text: the requirements of sections 254d through 254k of this title, , other than subsection (b)(5) of that section, and applicable to scholarship assistance provided under section 254 of this title shall not apply to the scholarship assistance provided under subsection (a) of this section.section 254m of this titlesection 254n of this titlel
The Native Hawaiian Health Scholarship program shall not be administered by or through the Indian Health Service.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1993 through 2019 for the purpose of funding the scholarship assistance provided under subsection (a) of this section.
